_comment: VULCAN — Scorchspire (gym 10, Fire) leader intro. A per-leader copy of leader_intro.json (the shared scene cannot carry a name title), reusing Cicada's relative+facingFrame+endBack:7 camera path VERBATIM so the leader-agnostic dolly still opens the battle from the endBack:7 stage-back via gym/engage_scorchspire_leader. Theme is Fire/forge: blaze + fire ambient into the over-shoulder pull, a lava-pop at the tight zoom-in on Vulcan's face, blaze-burn at the side profile, and the universal levelup swell to close. Particles are anchored ON the leader (uuid b935a014-b7ed-4879-b6cb-f76c2a064a28) via `execute at <uuid>` so flame/lava land on the Forgemaster instead of a challenger-facing guess — flame at the zoom (tick 78), lava at the side-profile cross (tick 96). IN-WORLD TUNING NEEDED: air-verify the flame/lava height (~1 block over the leader) and the zoom-keyframe framing at the real Scorchspire arena; nudge the ~1 particle offset if the leader model floats. endBack 7 MUST match leader_intro so the post-scene battle opens correctly.

cues.command: execute at b935a014-b7ed-4879-b6cb-f76c2a064a28 run particle minecraft:flame ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
execute at b935a014-b7ed-4879-b6cb-f76c2a064a28 run particle minecraft:lava ~ ~1 ~ 0.6 0.8 0.6 0.02 32 force
